title: Change `--main` and `--binary` to omit TOP name
body:
Currently `--main` (and `--binary`) uses the default top model name of "TOP". This means that the hierarchy printed in waves and VPI, etc, start with TOP, e.g. this

  ```
 module t;
     initial $display("%m");
   endmodule
```

Prints `TOP.t`.

To match other simulators the name() will be changed to `""`, this means the above will print `t`.

Be aware this may break VPI searches for signal names, and other behavior compared to previous Verilator versions.
